note: Add public Protocol Registry page for capsule-based timestamp / provenance records. Web-only. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. No transaction sent. No keys used. No payment collected. (A) NEW website/protocol-registry.html: native HTML page with magenta accent (#d946ef, same family as Trinity link). Sections: hero, definitional line, what-it-proves vs what-it-does-not-prove (two-column), how a registry capsule works (6 steps), example PoPC record (full JSON schema + expected resolved record), verification steps, proposed PROTOCOL_CLAIM_V1 template id (future extension, NOT activated), future anti-spam model (not active), legal-safe footer disclaimer. Uses existing CapsuleType::TEMPLATE_FIELDS_OPEN (0x05) for the first iteration; no new capsule type added at consensus. (B) Nav magenta link 'Protocol Registry' added across all main website HTML pages right after FAQ. Test/diagnostic pages (no FAQ anchor) skipped. Forbidden language audit: every mention of patent / trademark / exclusive-legal / legal-ownership appears ONLY inside denial wording ('it is NOT a patent...', etc.). No claim of legal ownership made anywhere. Legal-safe disclaimer in footer states the registry is evidentiary record only, not a patent office, trademark registry, or copyright registry, and that legal rights depend on applicable law and formal filings.
